Discard up to 2 cards from your hand. This attack does 60 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

Name: Ursaring
Effects: The Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

Name: Zangoose
Effects: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

Name: Lillipup
Effects: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

Name: Herdier
Effects: During your next turn, this Pokémon's attacks do 60 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Stoutland
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon. If this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon and is Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack, you may discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Effects: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Name: Rufflet
Effects: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

Name: Braviary
Effects: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.
Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

Name: Helioptile
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

Name: Heliolisk
Effects: If your opponent has any [L] Pokémon in play, this attack does 90 more damage.

Name: Stufful
Effects: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

Name: Bewear
Ability-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, your Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost is [C][C] less.
Effects: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

Name: Type: Null
Effects: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

Name: Silvally-GX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand.
Effects: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 70 more damage.
If your opponent's Active Pokémon is an Ultra Beast, it is Knocked Out. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Beastite
Description: The attacks of the Ultra Beast this card is attached to do 10 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon for each Prize card you have taken (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Bellelba & Brycen-Man
Description: Discard 3 cards from the top of each player's deck. When you play this card, you may discard 3 other cards from your hand. If you do, each player discards their Benched Pokémon until they have 3 Benched Pokémon. Your opponent discards first.

Name: Chaotic Swell
Description: Whenever either player plays a Stadium card from their hand, discard that Stadium card after discarding this one. (The new Stadium card has no effect.)

Name: Clay
Description: Discard the top 7 cards of your deck. If any of those cards are Item cards, put them into your hand.

Name: Cynthia & Caitlin
Description: Put a Supporter card from your discard pile into your hand. You can't choose Cynthia & Caitlin or a card you discarded with the effect of this card. When you play this card, you may discard another card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.

Name: Dragonium Z: Dragon Claw
Description: If the Pokémon this card is attached to has the Dragon Claw attack, it can use the GX attack on this card. (You still need the necessary Energy to use this attack.)[C][C][C] Destructive Drake GX 80×Discard all basic Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage for each card you discarded in this way. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)CCC        Attack 1 80×

Name: Erika
Description: Each player may draw up to 3 cards. You draw first.

Name: Great Catcher
Description: You can play this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand. Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon-GX or Pokémon-EX with their Active Pokémon.

Name: Guzma & Hala
Description: Search your deck for a Stadium card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. When you play this card, you may discard 2 other cards from your hand. If you do, you may also search for a Pokémon Tool card and a Special Energy card in this way.

Name: Island Challenge Amulet
Description: The Pokémon-GX or Pokémon-EX this card is attached to gets -100 HP, and when it is Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack, that player takes 1 fewer Prize card.

Name: Lana's Fishing Rod
Description: Shuffle a Pokémon and a Pokémon Tool card from your discard pile into your deck.

Name: Lillie's Full Force
Description: Draw 4 cards. At the end of this turn, if you have 3 or more cards in your hand, shuffle cards from your hand into your deck until you have 2 cards in your hand.

Name: Lillie's Poké Doll
Description: Play this card as if it were a 30-HP [C] Basic Pokémon. At any time during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, you may discard all cards from it and put it on the bottom of your deck. This card can't retreat. If this card is Knocked Out, your opponent can't take any Prize cards for it.

Name: Mallow & Lana
Description: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. When you play this card, you may discard 2 other cards from your hand. If you do, heal 120 damage from the Pokémon you moved to your Bench.

Name: Misty & Lorelei
Description: Search your deck for up to 3 [W] Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. When you play this card, you may discard 5 other cards from your hand. If you do, during this turn, your [W] Pokémon can use their GX attacks even if you have used your GX attack.

Name: N's Resolve
Description: Discard the top 6 cards of your deck. If any of those cards are basic Energy cards, attach them to 1 of your Benched [N] Pokémon.

Name: Professor Oak's Setup
Description: Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Pokémon of different types and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Red & Blue
Description: Search your deck for a Pokémon-GX that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck. (You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.)When you play this card, you may discard 2 other cards from your hand. If you do, search your deck for up to 2 basic Energy cards and attach them to the Pokémon you evolved in this way.

Name: Roller Skater
Description: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw 2 cards. If you discarded an Energy card in this way, draw 2 more cards.

Name: Rosa
Description: You can play this card only if 1 of your Pokémon was Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn. Search your deck for a Pokémon, a Trainer card, and a basic Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Roxie
Description: Discard up to 2 Pokémon that aren't Pokémon-GX or Pokémon-EX from your hand. Draw 3 cards for each card you discarded in this way.

Name: Tag Call
Description: Search your deck for up to 2 TAG TEAM cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Unidentified Fossil
Description: Play this card as if it were a 60-HP [C] Basic Pokémon. At any time during your turn (before your attack), you may discard this card from play. This card can't retreat.

Name: Will
Description: The next time you flip any number of coins for the effect of an attack, Ability, or Trainer card this turn, choose heads or tails for the first coin flip.

Name: Draw Energy
Description: This card provides [C] Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to a Pokémon, draw a card.

Name: Venusaur & Snivy-GX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, when you attach a [G] Energy card from your hand to it, you may switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.
Effects: This attack does 50 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), heal all damage from all of your Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Vileplume-GX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.
Effects: This attack does 10 less damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.
Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned, Paralyzed, and Poisoned. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Effects: You may search your deck for up to 3 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Ex-Rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Description: Search your deck for up to 2 TAG TEAM cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Draw Energy
Description: This card provides [C] Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to a Pokémon, draw a card.
